message:
fix: UnmarshalBdList envelope check uses len() not nil

In Go, json.Unmarshal of `[]` produces a non-nil empty slice.
The nil check would select an empty "issues" field over a populated
"beads" field in envelopes like {"issues":[],"beads":[{...}]}.

Changed to len() > 0 which correctly picks the populated field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
